articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Snap is cutting 1,000 jobs, 16% of its workforce - TechCrunch
articles.description: The company cites advancements in AI for the cuts.
articles.content: Snap is laying off roughly 16% of its global workforce, impacting around 1,000 full-time employees, according to a memo sent to staff from Snap CEO Evan Spiegel on Wednesday. The company cites advanc… [+1405 chars]
